scenario_name: Scenario A: Hawa and the Reconstructed Dossier
setting: Adré, Chad. Sudanese family arrives with scattered documents.
description: A Sudanese family (Hawa and her dependent Musa) arrive at first contact with six fragmentary artifacts. All four hero capabilities run end-to-end. Dignity Loop plays in French. Refugee corrects one field. Total wall time on Pi 5: ~75 s.

audio_transcript.text: My name is Hawa Adam. I have one child with me, his name is Musa Adam. We left our village near Al-Geneina because of the fighting. We crossed near Adré last week with the group. The birth year on my papers may be wrong—there are two different dates.

torn_passport_ocr.damage_notes: Top-left corner torn, some text faded
torn_passport_ocr.text:
REPUBLIC OF SUDAN
PASSPORT
Name: Hawa A. Adam
Father's Name: Adam Ahmed
Date of Birth: 1988
Place of Birth: Al-Geneina, Darfur
Nationality: Sudanese
Gender: Female
Child: Musa Adam
Year of birth: 2016?
[damaged section]
Issued: 2015
Validity: EXPIRED

unhcr_registration_token_ocr.text:
UNHCR TEMPORARY REGISTRATION TOKEN
Date of Registration: 2026-05-10
Registration Site: Adré, Chad
Principal Applicant: Hawa Adam
Date of Birth: 1988
Nationality: Sudanese
Dependent: Musa A.
Dependent DOB: 2017
Case Status: Under Review
Token ID: TRT-2026-0510-00147

whatsapp_screenshot.text:
12:34 PM: Hawa: 'We are safe now in Adre. My son is with me. Please help us find the camp.'
12:35 PM: Relative: 'God willing you are well. Do you have documents?'
12:36 PM: Hawa: 'Yes, passport and token.'

school_certificate_ocr.text:
Al-Geneina Primary School
Certificate of Attendance
Student Name: Musa Adam
Year: 2023-2024 Academic Year
Grade: Standard 2
Attendance: 94%
Teacher's Remarks: Diligent student, good progress.
Date: 2024-06-15

caseworker_intake_note.text: Family arrived via informal group. Mother presents documents but notes discrepancy in child's birth year across two artifacts (passport says 2016?, token says 2017). Mother is alert, responsive, Arabic-speaking (Sudanese dialect—good understanding of my Arabic). Child present and appears healthy. No immediate medical concerns noted. Recommend human review of birth year before record finalization. Mother agreed to Dignity Loop confirmation process.

expected_outcome.case_summary: Synthetic intake record for Hawa Adam (adult) and Musa Adam (dependent). Documents and testimony agree on names and origin but conflict on the dependent's birth year. Cross-modal conflict detected: passport says 2016?, UNHCR token says 2017. School certificate (dated 2024) shows student age consistent with either. Human review required before commit.

expected_outcome.plain_language_explanation: We have prepared a draft record from the information you gave and the documents you showed. The names are clear and consistent. However, we noticed that the child's year of birth appears different on two of your papers: one says 2016 (with a question mark), and another says 2017. A caseworker should review this with you and help clarify which year is correct before the record is saved.

draft_record.notes: Cross-modal conflict on dependent birth year. Mother alert and responsive. Child present, appears healthy. Caseworker recommends human review before finalization.
draft_record.conflict_summary: Dependent birth year: passport 2016? vs. UNHCR token 2017
